title: Progressive Disclosure, References, Scripts, and Assets · Protocol Recall
summary: Refactor an oversized skill into a compact router and focused resources. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a progressively disclosed skill package after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Keep metadata discriminative within shared context budgets.
Keep SKILL.md complete but route variant details to named resources.
Organize authoritative references by decision point and expected use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
